response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and architectures, but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership, team management at scale, or formal project oversight — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content/workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of leading teams, managing client projects, or architectural governance
Current career gap and recent short-term roles raise questions about stability and focus
